name: Lavere Jones School Bus Svc
principals: Donna Jones (Owner); founded/operated by Lavere Vernon Jones (1942-2015) and wife Donna June Miller Jones for 42+ years
districts_or_customers: Carroll County Public Schools (Westminster/Manchester MD area); USDOT 805622
recent_news: Founder Lavere V. Jones died July 17, 2015; widow Donna Jones (age ~82 per 2024 records) continues operating. No succession/sale news. Carroll County uses an owner-operator contractor model.
fit_notes: Classic family-owned Carroll County MD owner-operator with very high succession signal: founder deceased 2015, surviving spouse owner now ~82. Small (likely 1-3 buses) but textbook tuck-in candidate as part of a Carroll County roll-up of independent CCPS contractors.
